metadata.description: Standards bypass configuration for this branch

bypass.reason: No 'manager' citizen_class template exists in spawn. Devpulse is the only manager branch — not a missing file, just an unsupported template type.
Manager branch — coordinates via dispatch, doesn't generate system logs directly. Local logs from prax are sufficient.
Manager branch with minimal apps/ (auto-generated by spawn template push). Test quality improvements deferred until devpulse has real module logic to test.
Devpulse is not a user-facing CLI module — it's an orchestration hub accessed via drone routing, not direct invocation.
META block present but checker format mismatch — auto-generated entry point from spawn template push.
Handler security guard present (handle_command with caller check) but checker pattern mismatch.
Manager branch uses Rich Console directly — no cli_service dependency needed for a branch that doesn't build CLI features.
Manager branch — not a CLI module. Entry point auto-generated by spawn template. --help is implemented via print_introspection().

Watchdog module has its own _guard_caller() that blocks cross-branch invocation at the handle_command boundary. Inherits branch-level gap: devpulse has no apps/handlers/__init__.py inspect.stack guard.
Devpulse is a manager branch with no apps/handlers/json/json_handler. Watchdog logs through prax system_logger instead.
Inherits branch-level gap: devpulse has no apps/handlers/__init__.py inspect.stack guard (manager branch). Cross-branch protection enforced at the module layer via _guard_caller().
Devpulse is a manager branch with no json_handler. Agent handler logs through prax system_logger to stderr.
Structural Python package marker — inherits branch-level gap (devpulse has no apps/handlers/__init__.py inspect.stack guard, manager branch).
Standard Python package marker filename — required by Python, cannot be renamed to snake_case.

Inherits branch-level gap: devpulse has no apps/handlers/__init__.py inspect.stack guard (manager branch). Cross-branch protection enforced at the module layer via watchdog.py _guard_caller(). Same situation as watchdog/agent.py.
Devpulse is a manager branch with no json_handler. Timer handler logs through prax system_logger. Same situation as watchdog/agent.py.

Inherits branch-level gap: devpulse has no apps/handlers/__init__.py inspect.stack guard (manager branch). Cross-branch protection enforced at the module layer via watchdog.py _guard_caller(). Same situation as watchdog/agent.py and watchdog/timer.py.
Devpulse is a manager branch with no json_handler. Schedule handler logs through prax system_logger. Same situation as watchdog/agent.py and watchdog/timer.py.

Inherits branch-level gap: devpulse has no apps/handlers/__init__.py inspect.stack guard (manager branch). Cross-branch protection enforced at the module layer via watchdog.py _guard_caller(). Same situation as watchdog/agent.py, timer.py, schedule.py.
Devpulse is a manager branch with no json_handler. Registry logs through prax system_logger. Same situation as watchdog/agent.py, timer.py, schedule.py.

Test file imports aipass.devpulse.apps.modules.watchdog for direct router testing (same-branch import). Encapsulation check pattern-matches on 'from aipass.*.apps.*' shape regardless of same- vs cross-branch. Inherits branch-level gap (manager branch, no apps/handlers/__init__.py inspect.stack guard).
Same-branch import from devpulse handlers. Manager branch has no apps/handlers/__init__.py inspect.stack guard.
Devpulse is a manager branch with no json_handler. Feedback module logs through prax system_logger.
Feedback is a subcommand module routed via devpulse.py handle_command(), not a standalone entry point. Introspection is handled at the devpulse.py level.
Same-branch handler import. Manager branch has no apps/handlers/__init__.py inspect.stack guard.
Devpulse is a manager branch with no json_handler. Compose handler logs through prax system_logger.
Feedback handlers use console.print for Rich-formatted output routed through err_console. This is the intended output path for a manager-branch utility.
Same-branch handler import. Manager branch has no apps/handlers/__init__.py inspect.stack guard.
Devpulse is a manager branch with no json_handler. Inbox handler uses Rich console output.
Feedback handlers use console.print for Rich-formatted output routed through err_console. This is the intended output path for a manager-branch utility.

notes.usage: Add entries to bypass specific seedgo standard violations

fields.standard: Which standard to bypass (imports, cli, naming, etc.)
